---
title: "Introduction to Database"
format: html
---

## Database

Database is the center of how organizations manage data these days. On one hand, it is connected to various applications to save data on customers, transactions and internal operations; on the other hand, it is the source for various business analytics applications to draw data from.

Technically, database is a collection of realted tables.

### Tables

a collection of records on an object you would like to save data about, such as customer, contract, product, employee...
